nasb.text: His armor bearer said to him, “Do all that is in your heart; turn yourself, and here I am with you according to your desire.”

esv.text: And his armor-bearer said to him, “Do all that is in your heart. Do as you wish. Behold, I am with you heart and soul.”

cnv.text: 替他拿武器的僕人對他說：“照你的心意作吧！去吧，我必與你同心。”

ccb.text: 拿兵器的人答道：“就照你的意思，我会一心追随你。”
